plan: Overnight cache seeding via Phase 6 (160 fresh questions) through agentic pipeline.

recovery.phase6_failed: inspect log, reset cooldowns, re-run phase6
recovery.openrouter_quota_done: engine auto-flips to LOCAL_ONLY_MODE on 3 back-to-back 429s
recovery.neo4j_down: notify user to restart Neo4j Desktop

morning_deliverables: Stop app server only if user asks
